board_csa_architect.notes: New settings component. Reuses existing MFA backend endpoints. Standard CRUD UI.

board_ciso_cybersecurity.notes: QR code must only render over authenticated TLS. Recovery code display requires re-auth confirmation.

board_caio_fullstack.notes: No AI impact. Pure frontend component.

board_vp_ops_devops.notes: Eliminates CLI curl dependency for MFA management. Good for pilot UX.
